summary: Iteration 162 - P0 Auth Bug Fix Verification Complete. The fix (removing orphaned setAuthError(null) call from AuthCallback) is verified working. All 9 backend tests passed. All frontend auth flows tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: AuthCallback component (App.js lines 82-140) no longer contains setAuthError(null) call - no ReferenceError occurs
AuthCallback correctly extracts session_id from URL hash and query params (line 89)
AuthCallback shows 'Authenticating...' loading state while processing (lines 132-139)
AuthCallback redirects to /?login=true on auth failure (line 123)
Backend /api/auth/session returns 401 for invalid session_id (not 500) - correct error handling
Backend /api/auth/me returns 401 when no token provided - correct behavior
ProtectedRoute shows loading state during auth verification (lines 193-201)
ProtectedRoute shows Session Expired UI after 5 failed retries (lines 205-232)
ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users to landing page (line 236)
AuthModal.jsx handleGoogleLogin correctly constructs redirect URL using window.location.origin (lines 35-38)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 162 verified the P0 auth bug fix. The orphaned setAuthError(null) call was removed from AuthCallback component. All auth flows work correctly: (1) Landing page loads with Sign In button, (2) AuthModal opens with Google Sign In and email/password form, (3) AuthCallback handles invalid session_id gracefully without crashing, (4) Email/password login works and redirects to dashboard, (5) ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users, (6) ProtectedRoute shows Session Expired UI after auth retries fail. Backend endpoints /api/auth/session, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/login all return correct status codes (401 for unauthorized, 200 for success).

p0_bug_fix_setAuthError_removed.details: AuthCallback component no longer crashes - setAuthError(null) call was removed

auth_callback_session_extraction.details: session_id extracted from URL hash and query params correctly

backend_session_endpoint.details: Returns 401 for invalid session_id, 400 for missing session_id

backend_me_endpoint.details: Returns 401 without token, 200 with valid token

backend_login_endpoint.details: Returns 401 for invalid credentials, 200 with session_token for valid credentials

protected_route_loading.details: Shows 'Loading your dashboard...' during auth verification

protected_route_session_expired.details: Shows Session Expired UI with Retry and Log In Again buttons after 5 failed retries

protected_route_redirect.details: Redirects unauthenticated users to landing page

auth_modal_google_redirect.details: Google Sign In button present and uses window.location.origin for redirect URL

email_password_login_flow.details: Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard successfully
